ov_overview_body.en: Six Flags Over Georgia is the original Six Flags park in the southeastern United States, located in Austell, Georgia, just west of Atlanta. Opened in 1967 as one of the first Six Flags parks ever built, the park is home to an extraordinary collection of world-class coasters including Goliath, Twisted Cyclone, the legendary Mindbender triple-loop coaster, and the terrifying Acrophobia drop tower. With beloved classic rides dating back to the parks opening year and modern thrill machines, Six Flags Over Georgia is the premier theme park destination in the Atlanta metropolitan area.
ov_overview_body.es: Six Flags Over Georgia es el parque Six Flags original en el sureste de EE.UU. en Austell, Georgia. Abierto en 1967 hogar de Goliath Twisted Cyclone el legendario Mindbender y la terrorifica Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.fr: Six Flags Over Georgia est le parc Six Flags original dans le sud-est des Etats-Unis a Austell Georgie. Ouvert en 1967 domine par Goliath Twisted Cyclone le legendaire Mindbender et la terrifiante Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.de: Six Flags Over Georgia ist der ursprungliche Six Flags Park im Sudosten der USA in Austell Georgia. 1967 eroffnet Heimat von Goliath Twisted Cyclone dem legendaren Mindbender und dem furchteinflossenden Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.it: Six Flags Over Georgia e il parco Six Flags originale nel sudest degli USA ad Austell Georgia. Aperto nel 1967 casa di Goliath Twisted Cyclone il leggendario Mindbender e il terrificante Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.nl: Six Flags Over Georgia is het oorspronkelijke Six Flags park in het zuidoosten van de VS in Austell Georgia. Geopend in 1967 thuis van Goliath Twisted Cyclone de legendarische Mindbender en de angstaanjagende Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.pt: Six Flags Over Georgia e o parque Six Flags original no sudeste dos EUA em Austell Georgia. Aberto em 1967 lar de Goliath Twisted Cyclone o lendario Mindbender e o aterrorizante Acrophobia.
ov_overview_body.ru: Six Flags Over Georgia — оригинальный парк Six Flags в Остелле, Джорджия. Открыт в 1967 г.
ov_overview_body.zh: 六旗乔治亚乐园是位于佔治亚州奥斯底尔市的原始六旗公园。1967年开放。
ov_overview_body.ar: سيكس فلاجز أوفر جورجيا هو متنزه Six Flags الأصلي في أوستل، جورجيا. افتتح 1967.

ov_highlights_body.en: Goliath is one of the finest B&M hyper coasters in the southeastern United States delivering extraordinary airtime over a 61-metre first drop. Twisted Cyclone is a spectacular RMC hybrid coaster with three inversions. Mindbender is a legendary Schwarzkopf triple-loop coaster considered one of the finest classic coasters ever built. Acrophobia is one of the most terrifying drop towers in America tilting riders face-down before the plunge. Monster Plantation is a uniquely charming and historically significant dark ride beloved since 1967. Georgia Scorcher is the tallest fastest stand-up coaster on the East Coast.
ov_highlights_body.es: Goliath es uno de los mejores hyper coasters B&M del sureste. Twisted Cyclone es un espectacular coaster hibrido RMC. Mindbender es un legendario coaster de triple bucle Schwarzkopf. Acrophobia es una de las torres de caida mas aterradoras de America.
ov_highlights_body.fr: Goliath est l un des meilleurs hyper coasters B&M du sud-est. Twisted Cyclone est un spectaculaire coaster hybride RMC. Mindbender est un legendaire coaster triple boucle Schwarzkopf. Acrophobia est l une des tours de chute les plus terrifiantes d Amerique.
ov_highlights_body.de: Goliath ist einer der besten B&M Hyper-Coaster im Sudosten. Twisted Cyclone ist ein spektakularer RMC-Hybridcoaster. Mindbender ist ein legendarer Schwarzkopf-Dreifachloop-Coaster. Acrophobia ist einer der furchteinflossendsten Falltturme Amerikas.
ov_highlights_body.it: Goliath e uno dei migliori hyper coaster B&M del sud-est. Twisted Cyclone e uno spettacolare coaster ibrido RMC. Mindbender e un leggendario coaster triplo anello Schwarzkopf. Acrophobia e una delle torri di caduta piu terrificanti d America.
ov_highlights_body.nl: Goliath is een van de beste B&M hyper achtbanen in het zuidoosten. Twisted Cyclone is een spectaculaire RMC hybride achtbaan. Mindbender is een legendarische Schwarzkopf drievoudige loop achtbaan. Acrophobia is een van de meest angstaanjagende valtorens van Amerika.
ov_highlights_body.pt: Goliath e um dos melhores hyper coasters B&M do sudeste. Twisted Cyclone e um espetacular coaster hibrido RMC. Mindbender e um lendario coaster de triplo loop Schwarzkopf. Acrophobia e uma das torres de queda mais aterrorizantes da America.
ov_highlights_body.ru: Goliath — один из лучших гиперкоастеров. Twisted Cyclone — RMC гибрид. Mindbender — легендарный Schwarzkopf.
ov_highlights_body.zh: Goliath是东南部最佳B&M超高过山车之一。Twisted Cyclone是精彩RMC混合过山车。Mindbender是传奇的Schwarzkopf三环过山车。
ov_highlights_body.ar: Goliath من أفضل hyper coaster في الجنوب الشرقي. Twisted Cyclone هجين RMC. Mindbender Schwarzkopf أسطوري.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Six Flags Over Georgia opened on June 16 1967 and was one of the first major theme parks built in the American South. Mindbender opened in 1978 and was designed by legendary coaster designer Anton Schwarzkopf who created some of the finest steel coasters ever built. Twisted Cyclone opened in 2018 as an RMC conversion of the original Ninja coaster. Acrophobia opened in 2001 and was the worlds first open-floor drop tower. Monster Plantation has operated since the parks opening day in 1967 and is one of the oldest continuously operating dark rides in the United States. The park hosts Fright Fest and Holiday in the Park seasonal events.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Six Flags Over Georgia abrio el 16 de junio de 1967. Mindbender abrio en 1978 disenado por Anton Schwarzkopf. Twisted Cyclone abrio en 2018. Acrophobia abrio en 2001 como la primera torre de caida de piso abierto del mundo.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: Six Flags Over Georgia a ouvert le 16 juin 1967. Mindbender a ouvert en 1978 concu par Anton Schwarzkopf. Twisted Cyclone a ouvert en 2018. Acrophobia a ouvert en 2001 comme la premiere tour de chute a plancher ouvert au monde.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Six Flags Over Georgia eroffnete am 16. Juni 1967. Mindbender eroffnete 1978 von Anton Schwarzkopf entworfen. Twisted Cyclone eroffnete 2018. Acrophobia eroffnete 2001 als erster offener Fallturm der Welt.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Six Flags Over Georgia apri il 16 giugno 1967. Mindbender apri nel 1978 progettato da Anton Schwarzkopf. Twisted Cyclone apri nel 2018. Acrophobia apri nel 2001 come prima torre di caduta a pavimento aperto al mondo.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Six Flags Over Georgia opende op 16 juni 1967. Mindbender opende in 1978 ontworpen door Anton Schwarzkopf. Twisted Cyclone opende in 2018. Acrophobia opende in 2001 als de eerste open-vloer valtoren ter wereld.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Six Flags Over Georgia abriu a 16 de junho de 1967. Mindbender abriu em 1978 projetado por Anton Schwarzkopf. Twisted Cyclone abriu em 2018. Acrophobia abriu em 2001 como a primeira torre de queda de piso aberto do mundo.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Six Flags Over Georgia открылся 16 июня 1967 г. Mindbender спроектирован Антоном Schwarzkopf.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 1967年6月16日开放。Mindbender由Anton Schwarzkopf设计。Twisted Cyclone 2018年开放。
ov_did_you_know_body.ar: افتتح 16 يونيو 1967. Mindbender صممه Anton Schwarzkopf 1978. Twisted Cyclone 2018. Acrophobia 2001 أول برج سقوط بمقعد مفتوح.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and head straight to Goliath — it builds to long queues quickly. Twisted Cyclone second and Mindbender third. Acrophobia is best mid-morning. Monster Plantation is great for the afternoon heat. Flash Pass is recommended on busy days. The park is busiest on summer weekends and Georgia school holidays. Fright Fest in October and Holiday in the Park in December are spectacular seasonal events. Atlanta traffic can be heavy on summer weekends so plan your arrival accordingly.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Goliath. Twisted Cyclone segundo y Mindbender tercero. Flash Pass recomendado en dias concurridos. El parque es mas concurrido en verano y festivos de Georgia.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l ouverture et allez directement a Goliath. Twisted Cyclone deuxieme et Mindbender troisieme. Flash Pass recommande les jours charges. Le parc est plus anime les week-ends d ete.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie direkt zu Goliath. Twisted Cyclone zweiter und Mindbender dritter. Flash Pass empfohlen. Der Park ist an Sommerwochenenden am belebtesten.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva all apertura e vai direttamente a Goliath. Twisted Cyclone secondo e Mindbender terzo. Flash Pass consigliato. Il parco e piu affollato nei weekend estivi.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening en ga direct naar Goliath. Twisted Cyclone tweede en Mindbender derde. Flash Pass aanbevolen. Het park is het drukst op zomerweken.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai directamente a Goliath. Twisted Cyclone segundo e Mindbender terceiro. Flash Pass recomendado. O parque e mais movimentado nos fins de semana de verao.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. Goliath — первым. Flash Pass рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往Goliath。建议Flash Pass。夏季周末最拥挤。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ Goliath. Flash Pass موصى به.

ov_photos_body.en: Goliath photographed along the lakeside with the 61-metre first drop reflected in the water is the defining image of Six Flags Over Georgia. Twisted Cyclone photographed during one of its inversions against the Georgia skyline is spectacular. Mindbender photographed showing all three consecutive loops in one frame is extraordinary. Acrophobia photographed from below at full height with riders tilted face-down is terrifying. The park photographed at dusk during Fright Fest with lights and fog effects is breathtaking.
ov_photos_body.es: Goliath fotografiado junto al lago es la imagen definitiva. Twisted Cyclone durante una inversion es espectacular. Mindbender con los tres bucles en un encuadre es extraordinario.
ov_photos_body.fr: Goliath photographie le long du lac est l image definitive. Twisted Cyclone pendant une inversion est spectaculaire. Mindbender avec les trois boucles en un cadre est extraordinaire.
ov_photos_body.de: Goliath am See fotografiert ist das definitive Bild. Twisted Cyclone bei einer Inversion ist spektakular. Mindbender mit allen drei Schleifen in einem Bild ist aussergewohnlich.
ov_photos_body.it: Goliath fotografato lungo il lago e l immagine definitiva. Twisted Cyclone durante un inversione e spettacolare. Mindbender con tutti e tre gli anelli in un fotogramma e straordinario.
ov_photos_body.nl: Goliath gefotografeerd langs het meer is het definitieve beeld. Twisted Cyclone tijdens een inversie is spectaculair. Mindbender met alle drie de lussen in een frame is buitengewoon.
ov_photos_body.pt: Goliath fotografado ao longo do lago e a imagem definitiva. Twisted Cyclone durante uma inversao e espetacular. Mindbender com todos os tres loops num fotograma e extraordinario.
ov_photos_body.zh: Goliath沿湖拍摄是六旗乔治亚乐园的标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Goliath بجانب البحيرة هو الصورة المحددة.
